title: CAT (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Amendment Rules, 1993
description: CAT (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Amendment Rules, 1993
text: 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY {PAST H—SEC. 3(i)l MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st February, 1993 G.S.R. 41(E).—In exercise of the. powers conferred by clause (c) of sub- section (2) of Section 35 and section 36A of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the fdBlowing rules further to amend the Central Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, 1985, namely :— -- 1 of 6 -- REGD No. 33004/92 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART Il—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 30] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, FEBRUARY 1,1993/MAGHA 12, 1914 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation (1) 297 G.I/93 -- 2 of 6 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY {PART H—SEC. 3(i)J MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st February, 1993 G.S.R. 41(E).—In exercise of the. powers conferred by clause (c) of sub- section (2) of Section 35 and section 36A of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the fdttlowing rules further to amend the Central Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chainnan and Members) Rules, 1985, namely ;— -- 3 of 6 -- 3 1. (1) These rules may be called the Central Administrative Tribunal Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice' Chairman nd Members) Amendment Rules, 1993. (2) They shall be deemed to have co^ue into force on the 8th day of >ecember, 1992. 2. In rule 3 of the Central Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances nd Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, .985 for the abbreviation, figures and words "Rs. 7300-100-7600 per mensem;", he abbreviation, figures and words "Rs. 7300-200-7500-250-8000 per mensem;" hall be substituted. [No. A. 12018|7|91-AT] R. RAMANI, Jt. Secy, EXPLANATORY MEMORANDUM The Central Government has decided on 8th December, 1992 to revise the cale of pay of Members of the Central Administrative Tribunal. The Central administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service or Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules. 1985 are being amended accord- ngly, with effect from 8th December, 1992. 2. It is certified that no Member of the Central Administrative Tribunal is ikely to be affected adversely by this notification being given retrospective effect. FOOTNOTE.—The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India ide notification No. G.S.R. 644(E) dated the 10th August, 1985 and subsequent- amended vide notification— (i) No. GSR 583 (E) dated J 8-6-1987. (ii) No. GSR 9(E) dated 6-1-1988. (iii) No. GSR 79<E) dated 4-2-198S. (iv) No. GSR 324(E) dated ?-3-1988. (v) No. GSR 120(E) dated 22-2-1989. (vi) No. GSR 417(E) dated 31-3-1989.
